span.p:
Load Reflexion Insights
from past failures (up to 3)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 77, 64) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Inject into System Prompt:
Tools + Plan + Insights

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Build History from
all previous steps

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(191, 54, 12) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(13, 71, 161) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
LLM Call
System: tools + plan + insights
User: context + query + history

div.style: color: rgb(13, 71, 161) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Parse Output:
Thought + Action or Answer

span.p:
Store error as Observation
'Missing required field...'
LLM self-corrects next iteration

div.style: color: rgb(27, 94, 32) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Execute Tool via gRPC
Tool Service -> PostgreSQL

div.style: color: rgb(27, 94, 32) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(27, 94, 32) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Store: thought + action
+ action_input + observation
in steps[]

div.style: color: rgb(191, 54, 12) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(74, 20, 140) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Treat raw output as answer
EXIT LOOP
